creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
On our Redmine I always wanted to use HTTP authentication and there
is a plugin for it:
  http://github.com/AdamLantos/redmine_http_auth/

Fix: 

I had created FreeBSD port for this plugin; shar(1) archive is available
at the following URL:
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/redmine-http-auth/initial-port.shar

The archive also contains www/redmine/bsd.redmine.mk, the foundation
for all simple Redmine plugins: it features automated installation
and creation of packaging list for the plugins that can just be dropped
to the vendor/plugin directory of Redmine.  As per the manual,
  http://www.redmine.org/wiki/redmine/Plugins
it is the standard way to proceed.

It will be good if Bernhard will do the review for the bsd.redmine.mk
(and the new port too) and possibly approve this addition.
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
